reviews.title: Sooooo cute, soooo comfy
reviews.text: I am very picky when it comes to things touching my skin. My socks have to be on the correct foot, tags on clothes need to die, I’d rather wear my clothes inside out than feel a seam pressing into my skin. This band is exactly what I was looking for, barely there. It smells like real leather so I guess they weren’t lying about that. The color was labeled as blue but the picture looked greenish bluish grayish. In person it looks just like their picture and I’m happy about that. I’m petite and overweight (5’4 and 175lbs) and this size is perfect, plenty of room to go bigger or smaller. I adore the thinness of the band, no more bulky Fitbit!

reviews.title: Love this watch
reviews.text: Nice looking watch with accurate steps. I love the gps feature where it shows your walk on a true map on the app. Nice visual. Heart rate is very accurate as well. Haven't used music feature as much as I thought I would. Garmin makes a nice watch. Highly recommend.

reviews.title: Heart rate way off
reviews.text:
The main thing I bought this for is to monitor heart rate while hiking. Its reading is way off for me - as confirmed by a pulse ox and manually counting. The watch kept telling me my heart rate was over 100 just around the house. I have nsvt but my heart rate generally runs low. So I'm very sensitive when I have palpitations - when this watch kept saying my heart rate was over 95 I wasnt buying it. That brings into question any other readings or parameters.

I find the watch annoying and frustrating to use. The watch face does not interact very well for me. I'm constantly trying to tap it and it wont register so then the screen shuts off. Another annoying thing is it tells you to start moving around when I'm doing housework. I guess you can shut that off but I've really lost interest. Hopefully Garmin can offer some fix for the reading since its past the return date.

The positives - watch is comfortable and I don't wear jewelry. I forget its on. Its a large size so its readable if you have vision issues. I've had no problem with that.

reviews.title: Lightweight and perfect for small wrists
reviews.text: This is a great lightweight fitness tracker.  It has about a 4 day battery life and does a quick recharge.  It has a little learning curve for the activity tracking but it is right up there with my Apple Watch.

reviews.title: Beautiful Smart Watch
reviews.text: Very pleased.  Handsome titanium case.  Looks more like a  traditional watch than a smart watch.  All functions work on my IPhone 13.  Great choice of faces, including several analog choices.  Always on display is great,  Only one semi-negative.  You must have patience during the pairing process.  Same thing true with programming.  But once it is done, could not ask more from a reasonably priced smart watch. No help from a basically useless manual.  You are on your own.  But, with patience, worth the time it takes to figure out how to pair and operate  Took me about an hour.  Highly recommended

reviews.title: Battery life runs out quickly.
reviews.text: Nice looking.  Great apps and tracking. But battery life isn't all that great.

reviews.title: A good start but needs a lot of work.
reviews.text:
This is a tough review to write. If I could do half stars, this watch would be a 3.5 for me. It does so much right but it feels incomplete and overpriced to me.

First off, the screen and overall build quality is amazing. I have a Galaxy Active 2 as well and, candidly, this Zepp watch is better in pretty much every way in terms of build. The glass feels better and more scratch resistant. You get a stainless frame instead of aluminum. The shocker is the screen. I am not sure how but this watch looks brighter and crisper to me. The size is really nice as well. The Zepp E has a lower profile and almost no visible bezel. If hardware was the lone consideration, this would get a near perfect score.

The battery life is also really outstanding. I get 5 to 7 days with this. It has a proprietary magnetic charger that works well. Even playing with it often and tracking regular workouts doesn't seem to bother it.

I also like Zepp's approach to overall health measurement. The PAI (Personal Activity Intelligence) score tries to give you an overall measurement of how healthy your days are. Once you understand it, I think it is a good general snap shot. If everyone tracked their life like this, the world would be a much healthier place. Sleep tracking is good as well. In line with what I have gotten from Fitbit and Samsung though you need to make sure to set a daily screen timer as it doesn't automatically know to turn off the screen when you are sleeping like the others.

From here though things begin to slip. At $250, there is no onboard GPS. This is a big omission at this price. There also isn't auto tracking for workouts like most others have so you have to remember to physically start tracking workouts. There is no onboard music player though you can control your music from the watch. Interacting with your notifications and inbound calls are all but worthless. Zepp's app is also a mess. It is cumbersome and not well thought out. Everything you want is there but it often takes alot of effort to get from one thing to another. Samsung's app is vastly superior. Lastly, the watch comes with a leather strap. At the time of this writing, Zepp has silicone straps listed on their site but they don't appear to be available yet. A watch that is focused on health should come default with a silicone strap.

I guess I am just not sure what Zepp set out to accomplish with this watch. Is it a smart watch? Not really. Is it a fitness watch? Kind of. Its like they tried to split the baby and ended up accomplishing neither successfully. If you want a good looking everyday digital semi-smart watch with a great battery life, this is worth considering but, for most, at $250, there are better options out there. Perhaps Zepp will update this product and make it more well rounded. If not, I would suggest waiting for a price reduction before investing.

reviews.title: Only thing missing is the talk and messaging
reviews.text: Otherwise, it is similar to Apple watch. I easily set this up and downloaded the software from the app store. It installed easily with absolutely zero issues and you know it is always the software that has glitches. This watch is probably one of the better health smart watches on the market.. It looks nice, it performs nice and has lots of features. You will love the battery life, especially if you have a smartwatch that has to be charged almost daily or maybe ever day and a half. The watch monitors sleep stages, heart rate and 11 different exercises, including swimming. And, it is nice looking. Pretty sweet. I wanted to add that you can select so many faces for your watch without extra charges.

reviews.title: Broke 3 weeks after purchasing
reviews.text: To be fair with the manufacturer, one does not expect for your watch to fall often. In this case, the only time it fell, BOOM - the screen broke on one corner and the display became unusable.

reviews.title: Better than my Apple Watch
reviews.text: Got this for the kiddo. He’s 14 and Captain Destructo. This kid literally body slams trees for fun and the best and sturdiest gifts for him last about a week. Two if you’re lucky. We’re never lucky. However, it’s been a while and he wears it nonstop. Get this, it still works. He loves the band and all of the features. The battery life makes my jaw drop. I have to charge my Apple Watch at least once a day. This watch does more and has a battery life that won’t quit. I’d fight him for it but again…he body slams trees. Great purchase, guys. It’s also a smart and inexpensive way to test your kid’s level of responsibility before buying more expensive products and flushing your money.

🍀【Your personal health tracker】Blood Oxygen(SpO2) Monitor,High Precision Real-Time Heart Rate Monitor,Sleep Monitor,Stress Level Monitor and Health Reminders.All are key indicators of your overall wellness. They Track Your Health Smarter.UMIDIGI UFit Pro smartwatch also automatically records daily steps, Distance Counter，calories burned, active minutes,and understand your physical state

🍀【 Smart Assistant for You】Now you can take a photo on the watch by the remote shutter, or control music playback. Message notifications can be read directly on the watch. And more other features like the Weather forecast, Flashlight, Find My Phone, Alarm are available to let you have a more convenient life.

🍀【Long-lasting Battery Life & 5ATM Waterproof】UMIDIGI UFit Pro provides long battery life of up to 15 days with daily use. Keep tracking your workout data wherever you go.The Smart Watch is designed with 5ATM waterproof rating(50m waterproof), so no need to worry when you wear it while swimming or sweating out.

reviews.title: I wanted to love it
reviews.text: It really isn't the watches fault that I returned it.  It did all it said it would do, the Alexa feature worked, the heart rate monitor worked , the picture was bright, among other things. I didn't like that if you use the timer ( which I use frequently at my job) you can't go back to the main screen, if you do it turns off the timer, but you can use Alexa as a timer and don't have to stay on the same screen so there is a work around. I was also dissapointed with the fact there were only 4 face choices.  But, the reason I returned it is that my phone is older and it wears down my battery quickly and was causing cpu (?) overload warnings.

reviews.title: Solid watch
reviews.text:
Watch came well packaged and was easy to set up and pair using the provided instructions on the item page. It was made well and kept good time. I have a Motorola phone and it would not stay paired with my phone. The sleep feature never seemed to work because it was constantly disconnecting from the app. It may be a good choice for someone else, but I returned it.

The battery life was excellent and it was a well constructed and comfortable watch

reviews.title: Angry customer
reviews.text: So after receiving these items on March 29, 2021, it took 5 hrs to charge, the headphone jack doesn't even fit the watch!  On top of that my daughter plays on it for 15 mins and it dies!  She wore it to play on it and the wrist band broke!  I'm not happy at all and will never be buying this brand ever again!  It wouldn't even turn on right away after charging! The headphones are absolutely the worst thing ever ! I plugged them in to my phone and all we heard was high pitched screeching!  I'm not asking for my money back, I'm just warning others to be careful!  Complete false advertising!

title: SAMSUNG GEAR S3 FRONTIER Smartwatch 46MM (Bluetooth Only) - Dark Grey (Renewed)
description:
Stay in touch, without reaching for your phone, with the smartwatch that’s engineered for adventure. Convenience being the key feature, the watch offers fitness tracking, app access and watch face customization. With the Gear S3, you can pay right from your wrist and track your location as well. The Gear S3 is compatible with both Android and iOS smartphones.
Never Miss a Moment
The Gear S3 is Bluetooth connected so you can receive texts, emails, and alerts without reaching for your phone. With a built-in speaker and microphone, you can also make and answer calls hands-free. Just rotate the distinctive steel bezel to easily access apps and notifications so you can instantly check texts, updates, and more.
Pay with Your Watch
With Samsung Pay on your Gear S3, you can easily make payments with your watch almost anywhere you can swipe or tap a credit card - even without your phone or wallet.
Get Out There
Whether you’re off-roading or exploring a new city, the built-in GPS tracks your activity and makes it easy to share your location.
Designed for The Elements
The military-grade Gear S3 is tough enough to handle the elements. It resists water, dust, extreme temperatures, and the occasional drop so you can venture out with confidence.
Go for Days
Go nonstop for days on a single charge.4 When it’s time to recharge, the wireless charger lets you power up without slowing down.
Tailored to You
Make the Gear S3 your own. Customize your watch face, choosing from thousands of striking colors and designs. Plus easily swap out the standard 22mm band.
features: The Samsung Gear S3 has an always-on watch face and distinctive steel bezel that you can rotate to access apps and notifications.
The Samsung Gear S3 has an always-on watch face and distinctive steel bezel that you can rotate to access apps and notifications.

With the built-in S Health app, track your steps, monitor your heart rate, and more.

reviews.title: Just over 90 days and it completely died

reviews.title: Love this
reviews.text: Love this watch

reviews.title: Husband LOVES This
reviews.text: I bought this for my husband for his birthday and Father's Day and he loves it. He used to have a Galaxy S9, but dropped it into a lake while we were fishing *face palm*. But he ended up getting an old S7 from a family member and the watch connects with that as well. The only complaint I have heard from him is about the band, which was easy and cheap to replace with a metal material that didn't stick to his wrist as much as the rubbery band that comes with the watch.

reviews.title: Good watch
reviews.text:
I bought this when it first came out, I needed it's walking and stair climbing metrics.

It's big, heavy, and if you're at all active, it's on the charge cradle for around 1 hour. The big, heavy part, some like it, I wish it were a little smaller. The battery life, it's an early version, I didn't expect much, my next watch, 20 day minimum.

All in all, it's a very functional watch, feature laden, and good, as long as Samsung supports the OS

reviews.title: Fair features for the price
reviews.text:
First of all, you must keep in consideration that this is a $50 watch. That being said I will state what I consider are the pros and cons:

Pros
Price, battery life (more than the typical 1-day of apple watches), capable of answering and dialing within the watch (Bluetooth required) and blood oxygen and heart rate sensors.

Cons
Strap does not hold to watch and you must keep correcting it (solved with another strap?), blood pressure monitor? How???, you only have five watch faces at any given time but you can only replace one of the five - the others are permanently set, you get to edit the fourth one by adding a photo

Overall, there are cheaper and better watches like the WYZE (which I own and has better quality) but lack the phone answering and dialing features.

I will be replacing the strap with another type to see if it holds.

reviews.title: DO NOT BUY worked less than 60 days and no customer support.
reviews.text:
DO NOT WASTE YOUR MONEY. YOU WILL REGRET IT!!!!
UPDATE: Less than 60 days and the watched completely stopped working.
Being new to using a smart watch I didn't want to invest a fortune. Read lots of reviews and decided to give this one a try. It is perfect. It does everything I want it to do. It looks great. It is simple to set it up as you want. AND they provided exceptional customer service!

reviews.title: Not worth it
reviews.text: This watch has never worked and the instructions did not help.

reviews.title: There are TWO ways of rating this... Garbage or almost garbage.
reviews.text:
There are two ways of rating purchases... either an overall evaluation IRREGARDLESS of the price OR... CONSIDERING THE PRICE. Considering I paid $20 for it... not horrible. BUT here are the SERIOUS flaws so far:

-The Blood Pressure monitor is a COMPLETE JOKE. "Inaccurate" is NOT the word. I tried it on several friends and coworkers. Garbage!
-You are supposed to be able to make a gesture of bringing your wrist up to view the watch and then it is supposed to turn the screen on so that you can read it. ALMOST NEVER! No matter HOW I make the gesture the only thing that works is a PAINFUL twist/shake of my wrist and then it's not guaranteed. I just use the button instead which kind of defeats the purpose.
-BUT THEN, when sleeping.... EVERY DAMNED MOVEMENT I MAKE it turns on... and waking up my wife, because it is like having a flashlight shone in your face!!!!!!!!!!!

So... EVEN THOUGH this was only $20... SAVE YOUR MONEY FOR SOMETHING THAT ACTUALLY WORKS AND WORKS WELL.

reviews.title: Great Smart Watch!
reviews.text: It is a great dupe of Apple Watch.  I absolutely love it. The greatest attraction is the extended battery time (7 to 10 days). I also like various fitness track features such as step count, heart-beat, workout routine. I could check weather too. Another interesting feature is the multiple watch face options. However I struggled a bit figuring out how to change those watch faces. The watch faces can be changed easily using the APP. I found the questions and answers mentioned on the webpage pretty helpful when figuring out other elements.

reviews.title: Bad watch!

reviews.title: Nice resolution
reviews.text:
I bought this watch because of the high-resolution display. And that's what I got, no more, no less.

Upon first impression, I can tell the display has crisp graphics. The touch screen is responsive. The processor is fast. Overall, the phone itself is nice.

The app, on the other hand, is awful. It is intuitive, but it loses Bluetooth connectivity without reason. This is the only app that I've seen that will move forward and backward during a dial sync. When I switch to certain dials, the progress bar will reach 61%, then count back down to 60%, then 59%, then start going back up. It's nice to see honesty in an app, but it's just strange.

I didn't test notifications from other apps, but no SMS text messages came through. The setup is simple and easy with SMS notifications settings on its own section. But once set up, no messages came through.

Battery life? What battery life? After a fully charge, this watch drained to 90% in the 15 minutes I used to overlook the features and set up the app. This from a 330mAh battery. At this rate, the battery will be depleted in less than two hours.

reviews.title: Junk
reviews.text: What a piece of junk. The instructions don't match the watch or the Amazon description and is written in awful broken English. And the app--- AWFUL. Navigation is bad, the English on the app is even worse than the instructions. I'm seriously concerned that downloading the app has somehow compromised anything on my phone. While I understand Amazon is a gigantic company that can't police every single item for sale, this is just BLATANTLY bad. In case my review isn't already clear, DO NOT BUY.

reviews.title: Great watch for the price
reviews.text: It was very difficult for me to set up this watch until I scanned the scan code from the pamphlet. The directions weren't easy. I think I would like a watch a little smaller but I like the shape and bands.  The price was great. I'm still not sure about the sleep mode, nothing seems to be registering. Steps are showing up which is cool, BPM is registering. Still figuring it out. Arrived promptly.  Additional info: the watch is NOT tracking my erratic sleep pattern, which I really needed it to do. I also found the size of the round watch intrusive to my long sleeve shirts and arm. Loved the pink and green bands and the color of the watch face. Steps are also not being accurately recorded. So sad, really had high hopes for this.

reviews.title: Worth the money n saved my life
reviews.text: Love the feminine color. Easy to see. Helps me keep track of certain health irregularities as they happen therefore possibly averting a health emergency. Ty for having an ingenious machine in such a lovely and compact device.

description:

Compatible Models: Perfectly Compatible with Fitbit Inspire 3 Tracker Smart Watch
Material: Farluya Fitbit Inspire 3 bands are made of high quality silicone material, flexible, lightweight and very comfortable to wear.
Special features:
1. Design: The bands design with adjustable buckles your wristband reliably, not easy to fall off when doing sports, safer and stronger.Not only thin, but also a chic look. Which make the wrist looks more fashionable and move more freely,a better choice of any occasions like sport, study,travel, work, party for women,men,boys and girls.
2.Elegant & Beautiful：Multiple color to choose, highlight personality, match your clothes, make you more attractive.
3. Perfectly fits: Easy to install and adjust freely according to your wrist size, no any tool needed. Easy to wear and adjust.
features: Compatible Models: The bands only compatible with Fitbit Inspire 3 Tracker Smart Watch.
Premium Material: The bands are made of high quality silicone material, flexible, lightweight and very comfortable to wear.
Adjustable & Multi Colors: Small size for 5.5" - 8.1" wrist, Large Size for 6.1" -9.1" wrist.A variety of color choices, you can match according to the occasion, mood, clothes, wear your charm.
Easy to install: Freely adjust to fit your wrist size,without any additional tools.Secure enough to avoid the falling off. Easy and simple installation or removal.

Half year Guarantee: Farluya provide a wonderful shopping experience,If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us, we will solve it for you as soon as possible and willing to receive suggestions.

reviews.title: Fit my inspire 3
reviews.text: These bands fit my Inspire 3. They are a little tricky to get on. Comfortable.

title: Smart Watch (Make/Receive Call), 1.09" Touch Screen Smart Watches for Women Compatible with Android iOS Phones, IP67 Waterproof Fitness Tracker with Heart Rate Blood Oxygen Sleep Monitor (Black)
features: ♚【 Smartwatch with Bluetooth phone calls】The smart watches for women built in bluetooth call functions, after connect the smart watch with your phone via Bluetooth and add contacts via APP"Lufitcode". Then you can make or receive calls on the watch directly. No worries about answering calls when your phone is in pocket with no free hand.

✯【Exquisite Design with Custom Watch Face】This bluetooth smart watch is made of zinc alloy with silicone strap, soft and elegant. The smartwatches contains 3 main dials readily available to choose from along with another 30 dials in the Lufitcode app.You can also customize the watch faces in Lufitcode APP. It can be your sefie,family, pet or scenery,etc.

♚【 Smart Notifications 】This health watches for women iphone really works "SMART" to notify Incoming calls, SMS Message, Alarm Reminder, Sedentary Reminder, Drinking Water Reminder, and SNS notifications (Wechat, Facebook, Twitter, Line, Skype, WhatsApp, Kakaotalk, Instagram, Snapchat etc). The screen will automatically wake up when you raising your hand and you can adjust the brightness of the screen.

❤【All day activity track & Health Monitoring】The bluetooth watch for iphone accurately track all-day activities like steps, calorie burned, walking mileage. It has 6 sports modes, such as football, cycling, walking, running, yoga, climbing. Which can meet the daily exercise conditions of all women. This ladies watch automatically monitor your heart rate, sleep status(deep sleep, light sleep, awake time), and provide a comprehensive sleep quality analysis.

♛【 IP67 Waterproof & Wide Compatibility & Long Standby Time 】This bluetooth watch android designed with IP67 waterproof, you can wear it during washing hands, swimming or in rainy day (NOTE: Do not use in hot water, such as showers, saunas, etc). It only takes 2 hours to fully charge the smartwatch, 15 days in standby time, and 5 days for regular use. The smart watch compatiable with Android 5.0 or iOS 9.0 or above and Bluetooth 4.0 or above.

reviews.title: Se me dañó en poco tiempo..!☹️ No quiere prender ni hace nada.. inversión perdida..!
reviews.text: Se me dañó muy rápido.. ☹️ No prende lo conecte al cargador y no agarra carga..

reviews.title: Battery keeps fading/ very limited watch faces and limited app.
reviews.text: Dealing with the company was good, they offered to send another watch as I do like the look of it. However, after having the battery fade after 1.5 days and screen going black and not having many watch faces I decided not to bother with it anymore.  Maybe the new one would be fine but I had spent too much time on a simple procedure with watch. Also, the app is limited, it did not show how much battery there was left which seems strange. I returned it.

reviews.title: Love my smart watch
reviews.text: I like the big round face. I am able o read my notifications. I have not figured out how to use the microphone for music and the timing on the stop watch.  The watch is very light and I love the being able to pick the different face cover on the front. The watch band is very comfortable.

reviews.title: Nice watch if it lasted even a day without needing charged.
reviews.text: I would have really enjoyed this watch if it wasn't for the terrible battery life. It won't even make it an entire day without needing charged up again.

reviews.title: Love it!!!!
reviews.text: I cant say enough about this watch!! I love it so much! All the features are great! My favorite is the tracking of how I sleep! The phone speaker works great to!

title: AK Silicone Bands Compatible with Fitbit Versa 4 Bands & Fitbit Sense 2 Bands for Women Men, Soft Straps Replacement Wristbands for Fitbit Versa 3 & Versa 4 / Sense & Sense 2 Smart Watch (Black)
features: 【Silicone Bands for Fitbit Versa 3 & Versa 4 and Fitbit Sense & Sense 2】: AK soft sport silicone bands for Fitbit Versa 3 & Fitbit Versa 4 & Fitbit Sense & Fitbit Sense 2 Smart Watch ONLY. One-Click Installation & disassembly. NO falling off or loose issue, perfectly fit your fitbit versa 3/4/sense/sense 2 watch (Watch Bands Only, No Watch Included)

【Free Size & 10 Colors Available】: One Size fits for 5.5" - 7.9" (140mm-200mm) wrist. There are Pink Sand, Wine Red, Light Blue, Pink, Blue Gray, Pine Green, Gray, Navy Blue, Black and White colors available, which will provide your fitbit versa 3 / versa 4 & fitbit sense/sense 2 a personalized and fashionable look. Have it and you will be the brightest star in the crowd.

【Made of High Quality Silicone Material】: AK for fitbit sense 2 bands are made of soft, flexible, durable silicone material which is easy to clean, comfortable to wear and skin-friendly, sweat & water resistant, No irritation, No fading. Have these fitbit versa 4 bands will bring you excellent wearing experience when exercising, sleeping and daily workouts.

【Easy to Install and Remove】: These fitbit versa 3 bands are with Push Button Design same as original band makes it easy to install & remove. Just gently push the band to put on and press the button to remove. No pins, NO tool required. The bands will lock onto your fitbit versa 3/4 & sense/sense 2 precisely and securely.
【Package Included】: 1 * Replacement Silicone bands for Fitbit Versa 4 / Fitbit Versa 3 / Fitbit Sense 2 /Fitbit Sense Only (The Smart Watch is NOT included).

reviews.title: Perfect
reviews.text: Perfect and of high quality

reviews.title: Good Replacement Band For Fitbit Sense
reviews.text:
The AK Silicone Band attached securely to my Fitbit Sense without any problems.
It fits my wrist perfectly and is very comfortable to wear. I've had it on for approximately a month with no issues. It's not as easy to put on my wrist as the original Fitbit band, but that is a minor issue.
It appears to be very well made and time will tell about durability.
I'm very happy that I purchased this replacement band.
